description_long: This object is a stylized flowering plant with a tall, slender green stem that curves gently at the top, supporting three drooping magenta-pink blossoms. Each flower has several broad, rounded petals arranged in a whorled pattern, with the petals overlapping slightly and forming a bell-like shape. The blossoms hang downward from individual stalks branching from the main stem, giving the plant a graceful, arching appearance. At the base, there are two large, ovate green leaves, one of which is slightly curved and the other more elongated, both attached directly to the stem. The surface of the petals and leaves appears matte and smooth, with subtle color gradients and shading. This plant would be well-suited for placement in urban parks, gardens, or landscaped sidewalk areas.
description: A tall, slender green-stemmed plant with three drooping magenta-pink flowers and two large ovate green leaves at the base. The blossoms are bell-shaped with overlapping petals and hang gracefully from curved stalks.
description_view_0: The plant is seen with three prominent drooping flowers and two large green leaves, one leaf partially obscured behind the stem.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the arching stem and the arrangement of the three blossoms, with both leaves fully visible and spread apart at the base.
description_view_2: The view shows the flowers from the side, emphasizing the curvature of the stem and the overlapping petals, with one leaf more visible than the other.
description_view_3: The plant is viewed from the opposite side, displaying the full spread of the two leaves and the downward orientation of the blossoms.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a whorled configuration, with each flower displaying multiple overlapping petals radiating symmetrically around the central axis, forming a bell-like shape.
